title: Mechanicus powered Imperial IDE control shell and TUI foundation on PC
mission_summary: Build the first controlled local management shell for Imperium New Reality: a Mechanicus-backed Imperial IDE CLI and TUI foundation with dashboards for tasks, reports, receipts, tools, capabilities, governance, and dry-run tool invocation.

strategic_intent.kernel: Imperium New Reality is the kernel of the future custom IDE.
strategic_intent.shell: This task creates the first controlled shell that can be used from the repository and later embedded into the IDE.
strategic_intent.mechanicus: Mechanicus must mediate tools, validation, receipts, and command safety.
strategic_intent.ide: Imperial IDE must grow as an extension-capable local development surface over the kernel.
strategic_intent.safety: No unrestricted real command execution is enabled in this task.

source_context_to_consider: Owner direction: move toward a managed custom IDE shell, with Mechanicus as tool guardian and validator

organ_route.DOCTRINARIUM: ensure the shell follows active governance and does not overclaim full IDE completion
organ_route.OFFICIO_AGENTIS: owner-facing Russian final summary and operator-facing command notes
organ_route.ASTRONOMICON: task registry, current task, launch card, taskpack and report browsing integration
organ_route.ADMINISTRATUM: receipts, continuity pack, command history, report retention and push closure
organ_route.MECHANICUS: tool registry, command policy, validators, dry-run gateway, command receipts
organ_route.INQUISITION: safety gates, fake-green block, unsafe execution block, validation downgrade
organ_route.STRATEGIUM: large-step sequencing, KPD, shell roadmap, next build ladder
organ_route.SCHOLA_IMPERIALIS: operating lessons, reusable shell patterns, owner workflow learning

cyrillic_in_taskpack.scope: MANIFEST.json, TASK_SPEC.md, ACCEPTANCE_GATES.md, OUTPUT_REQUIREMENTS.md, TASK_ROUTE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json, TASK_START_ACK_TEMPLATE.json

localization_exception.scope: owner-facing runtime files only after Officio role entry

allowed_when: Imperial IDE CLI smoke tests pass or exact blockers are recorded
Imperial IDE TUI non-interactive smoke passes or exact blockers are recorded
Mechanicus doctor and dry-run gateway remain safe
no secret files or local operator configs are staged
forbidden_push_cases: failed validation without explicit BLOCK verdict
secrets, credentials, or local operator configs staged
destructive cleanup or delete without owner batch approval

local_only_allowed_operations_not_to_com: .git/info/exclude update for local contour_route_config.json if needed
primary_outputs: Astronomicon task and report dashboard integration
Receipt viewer and command history model
Extension registry seed and extension loader contract
Validation, smoke, commit, and push receipts
